case_title: APP PHARMACEUTICALS LLC et al VS. COLUMBIA CASUALTY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APP PHARMACEUTICALS LLC APP PHARMACEUTICALS INC. ABRAXIS BIOSCIENCE INC. ABRAXIS BIOSCIENCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COLUMBIA CASUALTY COMPANY DOES 1 THRU 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-29-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-27-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-14-2010 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
FEE FOR STIP AND ORDER TO EXTEND DATE TO RESPOND FILED BY DEFENDANT COLUMBIA CASUALTY COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO EXTEND THE DATE FOR COLUMBIA CASUALTY COMPANY TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT TO JANUARY 4, 2010; STIPULATION
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-29-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
